ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "shortcode" TEXT /* Shortcode of the post */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account that made the post */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made in UTC */,
  "is_video" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the post is a video */,
  "is_sponsored" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the post is sponsored */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption text of the post */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location where the post was made */,
  "location_latlong" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the content type */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who saw the post */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate (total engagement divided by reach) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the post was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post received */,
  "video_view_count" INTEGER /* Count of video views (if applicable) */,
  "video_length" REAL /* Length of the video in seconds (if applicable) */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was shared */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was saved */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on links in the post */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated post */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated post */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username that is mentioned in the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_latlong" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_name FOREIGN KEY ("location_name") REFERENCES posts ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the post */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, interaction) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the post */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the post */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., image, video, text) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
